## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call to explore GrowthX's content scaling services for ModelOp.](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**ModelOp's Challenge:** Inconsistent content production and difficulty scaling technical content for its new market, despite using a mix of freelancers, in-house AI, and internal experts.](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Solution:** A hybrid agency/platform service that acts as a full content team, using proprietary AI workflows to deliver a high volume of quality, technical content for AI and traditional search.](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [**Pricing & Fit:** The service is a premium investment ($40k sprint + $18k/mo retainer), designed for companies with strong conviction in content as a primary growth channel. ModelOp is interested but must evaluate the budget.](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)

## Topics

### ModelOp's Content Challenges

  - [**Primary Need:** Automate lead attribution reporting, a manual process since migrating to HubSpot.](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [**Secondary Need:** Address inconsistent content production, a key challenge for scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [**Current Mix:** Freelancers, in-house team (Jay Combs, Demand Gen Director), internal experts (Product/CTO), and AI tools (ChatGPT, Perplexity).](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
      - [**AI Limitation:** AI is used only for brainstorming and editing, as it produces inaccurate or bland content for ModelOp's new, technical market.](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)

### GrowthX's Solution: A Hybrid Agency Model

  - [**Model:** A hybrid agency/platform service where GrowthX acts as a full content team, managing strategy, execution, and reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
  - [**Core Technology:** A proprietary internal platform with agentic AI workflows for research, writing, and optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
      - [**Inputs:** Workflows are guided by client-specific artifacts (personas, brand guidelines) and deep product knowledge.](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
      - [**Quality Control:** Workflows self-correct (e.g., re-running research) to meet quality thresholds, ensuring accuracy for technical topics.](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
      - [**Phase 1: Strategy Sprint ($40k fixed fee)**](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
          - [Develops custom AI workflows and a content roadmap based on search volume and competitor analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
          - [Delivers 5–10 articles, with publishing starting by week 4.](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
      - [**Phase 2: Retainer ($18k/month)**](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
          - [Delivers 5 net-new or refreshed articles per week.](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
          - [Includes forward-deployed AI engineers for custom pipeline work.](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)
  - [**Commitment:** Phase 1 is a standalone engagement; clients decide to opt into Phase 2 at the end of the sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)

### Pricing & Fit

  - [**Pricing:**](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
      - [Phase 1 (Strategy Sprint): $40,000 fixed fee.](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
      - [Phase 2 (Retainer): $18,000 per month.](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [**Target Client:** Companies with strong conviction in content as a primary growth channel, typically Series A–C startups or enterprises.](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
  - [**ModelOp's Position:** Interested in the solution's power and consistency but must evaluate the budget.](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler Pavlas:** Send ModelOp technical content examples and case studies.](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [**Tyler Pavlas:** Schedule a follow-up platform demo to show workflow mechanics.](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
  - [**Jay Combs:** Review materials and evaluate the budget against other vendors.](https://fathom.video/share/KScUzPu3sBkzjC3rEFpFrDaeLdsfrM7g?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
